prompt: Can you help me write a full Strudel pattern with drums, a bassline, and a melody? I want something with a house music feel.

assertions.check: Response uses $: prefix to run multiple patterns simultaneously
Response includes a drum pattern with bd (kick) and other drum elements
Response includes a bass element (low note pattern)
Response includes four-on-the-floor kick (bd*4) or other house music characteristic patterns

assertions.description: Uses at least one audio effect
assertions.check: Response uses at least one effect like lpf, room, delay, or filter
